surface.name: Confluent Cloud Console quick start: cluster, topic, and message
surface.selection_basis: The Cloud Console provides a hosted path to create Kafka resources, produce a message, and view it without a local Kafka installation.

alternatives_considered.name: Local Confluent CLI quick start
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: It adds CLI installation and local credential setup while the Cloud Console supports the same first hosted message journey.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Confluent Cloud account, create Kafka resources, and produce and view a first message.
assumed_prior_state: The developer begins before account creation with no platform resources or credentials.
A supported browser and internet connection are available.

documented_first_success.official_milestone: Produce and consume a message in Confluent Cloud
documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: A message produced to a Cloud topic is visible when consuming or viewing messages from that topic.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The topic message viewer shows the produced record and its value.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: The topic message viewer shows the produced record and its value.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: This is the first observable end-to-end result on the selected official surface; later production configuration and expansion follow it.

prerequisites.requirement: A payment method or trial entitlement if the account requires it.
Permission to create an environment, cluster, and topic.

primary_path.action: Create or sign in to Confluent Cloud and open the Cloud Console.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Activate the trial or add payment information if the account requires billing setup.
primary_path.output: The account can create Cloud resources.
primary_path.success_signal: The account can create Cloud resources.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Create or select an environment and create a basic Kafka cluster.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Create a topic in the cluster.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Use the Console producer to send a test message to the topic.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Open the topic messages view and inspect the produced record.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

friction_gates.description: Some account states may require payment information before cluster creation.
Cluster provisioning may take time before topic operations are available.

uncertainties.question: Trial eligibility and whether payment is required vary by account and region.
uncertainties.impact: The exact number or ordering of required onboarding actions may vary for a fresh account.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: Public official documentation does not fully expose every authenticated or account-dependent state.

excluded_after_success: Production hardening, scale configuration, and ongoing operations after the first successful result.
